must_have_breakdown.evidence: Resume explicitly lists Git, GitHub, and Bitbucket under version control and uses them across both roles.
Jenkins listed under DevOps tools and referenced in project work at Capgemini.

reasoning: Reject — wrong domain entirely. This candidate is a Salesforce DevOps Engineer with 5 years of experience building CI/CD pipelines for Salesforce deployments. The JD requires a Junior Python Developer who can write backend services in Python, Django, Flask, or FastAPI, work with relational and NoSQL databases, and has Python project experience including AI model training. There is zero evidence of Python programming, web frameworks, database management (MySQL/PostgreSQL/MongoDB), or AI/ML work anywhere in this resume. The only overlapping skills are Git/GitHub/Bitbucket and Jenkins — generic DevOps tools that represent 2 out of 15 must-haves. Furthermore, the recruiter specifically called out Python projects and AI model training as key hiring criteria, both of which are completely absent. Do not proceed with this candidate for this role.
strengths: GIT/VERSION CONTROL: Demonstrated active use of Git, GitHub, and Bitbucket across both TCS and Capgemini roles — the only hard-skill overlap with the JD, though it is a basic requirement, not a differentiator.

JENKINS CI/CD: Has hands-on Jenkins experience referenced in current Capgemini role alongside GitHub Actions, showing pipeline automation competency — entirely in the wrong domain (Salesforce) but the tooling knowledge exists.

CERTIFICATIONS DEPTH: Holds 7 certifications including Copado Certified Consultant and Salesforce AI Associate — shows discipline and continuous learning, though none are relevant to Python development or AI model training.
gaps: ZERO PYTHON DEVELOPMENT EXPERIENCE: The JD's core requirement is Python (3.x) with Django/Flask/FastAPI for backend services. This candidate has no Python code written, no backend projects, and no web framework exposure — this is a fundamental domain mismatch, not a skill gap.

NO AI MODEL TRAINING OR PYTHON PROJECTS: The recruiter explicitly requires Python projects and AI model training experience. The candidate's 'Salesforce AI Associate' cert is a conceptual certification, not evidence of training models — this directly contradicts the ideal candidate profile.

scoring_factors.reason: No JD notice period limit specified; no penalty applied.
JD requires in-office work in Bangalore; candidate is based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu — location mismatch.
JD requires 0 years relevant experience (fresher/junior role); no minimum threshold to fail on.
JD gender preference is 'Any'; no penalty applied.
No college preference or exclusion specified in JD; no adjustment applied.

availability_reason: Current role at Capgemini shows 'May 2025 – Present' with no end date or notice period stated; standard notice period for this seniority level in India is typically 60-90 days but cannot be confirmed from the document.
alternative_role_fit: Senior Salesforce DevOps Engineer / Salesforce Release Manager
rare_assets: Copado Certified Consultant — a relatively niche and highly valued credential in the Salesforce DevOps ecosystem, held by a small percentage of practitioners.
Flosum Certified Professional — Flosum is a security-first DevOps platform with very limited certified practitioners in the market.
Multi-tool Salesforce DevOps mastery spanning Copado, Gearset, Flosum, and DevOps Center simultaneously — extremely rare in a single profile.
self_reported_unverified: 'Reduced deployment time by 30-40%' — no baseline deployment count, team size, or org complexity provided to validate the scale or attribution of this claim.
'Best Performer Award' and 'Special Achievement Award' — internal awards with no external verification or context on selection criteria or pool size.
'Improved deployment success rate' — no before/after percentage or absolute numbers provided to substantiate this claim.
interview_flags: Probe whether candidate has any Python scripting exposure outside of Salesforce shell scripting (YAML/XML automation) — even hobbyist projects would be relevant.
Ask specifically about the 'Salesforce AI Associate' certification — determine if this reflects any hands-on ML/AI work or is purely a conceptual/exam-based credential.
Clarify notice period at Capgemini — role started May 2025 and appears current; a 60-90 day notice could delay joining significantly.
Probe willingness and rationale for relocating from Chennai to Bangalore for an in-office junior Python role — significant seniority and compensation downgrade.

Ask why candidate is applying for a Junior Python Developer role after 5 years of senior Salesforce DevOps experience — understand if there is a genuine pivot plan or if this is a mismatch in application.
